sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46981" key="h(merogra/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερο-γράφος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n46981.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who keeps a diary</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Procl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
